positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene. Featuring bioluminescent flora, glowing mushrooms, and floating geometric crystal elements growing from ancient roots. The composition must be centrally balanced, creating a striking, high-contrast silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Use deep indigo and emerald green as primary colors, accented by neon cyan glows. The style should be a highly detailed, clean vector illustration mixed with ethereal stained glass aesthetics. Perfect symmetry, minimalist yet maximal detail, clean lines, perfect composition, high resolution, black and white vector option.
